mumbai_1990:manglik.manglik_report: Manglik Dosha is very strong and has a major impact. You are Manglik.

mumbai_1990:sadhesati_current_status.is_undergoing_sadhesati: No, currently you are not undergoing Sadhesati.
mumbai_1990:sadhesati_current_status.what_is_sadhesati: Sadhe Sati refers to the seven-and-a-half year period in which Saturn moves through three signs, the moon sign, one before the moon and the one after it. Sadhe Sati starts when Saturn (Shani) enters the 12th sign from the birth Moon sign and ends when Saturn leaves 2nd sign from the birth Moon sign.  Since Saturn approximately takes around two and half years to transit a sign which is called Shani's dhaiya  it takes around seven and half year to transit three signs  and that is why it is known as Sadhe Sati. Generally Sade-Sati comes thrice in a horoscope in the life time - first in childhood, second in youth & third in old-age. First Sade-Sati has effect on education & parents. Second Sade-Sati has effect on profession, finance & family. The last one affects health more than anything else.

report.report:
In your horoscope the Anant Kaal Sarp Yog is present . Due to this there are hurdles in life and native has to struggle for moving ahead. The native has to work hard for build up of character and for moving ahead.

The education of the native remains ordinary. The worries and mental unrest do not leave the native due to one reason or other. The native may suffer due to defamation. Sometimes disinterest develops in life.

The native changes his work again and again therefore there are losses. Particularly the work of bankers suffers.

Due to the influence of Kaal Sarp Yog the native indulges in low acts. The native suffers from diseases many times that cause loss of money and the native may suffer due to debts. The native remains mentally disturbed from time to time. The married life is painful and disturbed. The native does not get the bliss of parents. The own relatives try to cause harm from time to time.

There may be some loss due to lawsuits. The enemies of the native hatch conspiracies against him and try to cause harm. On many occasions there is fall of prestige or there is lack of esteem. However the native also gets a miraculous time in life.

Sadhe Sati starts when Saturn (Shani) enters the 12th sign from the birth Moon sign and ends when Saturn leaves 2nd sign from the birth Moon sign.  Since Saturn approximately takes around two and half years to transit a sign which is called Shani's dhaiya  it takes around seven and half year to transit three signs  and that is why it is known as Sadhe Sati. Generally Sade-Sati comes thrice in a horoscope in the life time - first in childhood, second in youth & third in old-age. First Sade-Sati has effect on education & parents. Second Sade-Sati has effect on profession, finance & family. The last one affects health more than anything else.

The worries and mental unrest do not leave the native due to one reason or other. Due to Kaal Sarp Yog the native suffers from diseases many times that cause loss of money and the native may suffer due to an accident. The financial position of the native remains weak as his expenses may be more. However by hard work financial position become all right.

The enemies of the native hatch conspiracies against him and try to cause harm but they are not successful. The native receives defame from his own family or community. His near relatives do not regard him in high esteem. The friends of the native try to deceive him again and again.

report.report:
In your horoscope the Takshak Kaal Sarp Yog is present. Due to this reason the native may have conflicts with partners in business or there may be loss in partnership. There are hurdles in life and native has to struggle for moving ahead. However later on, all hurdles get removed. There may be hurdles in getting a senior position but native is able to remove these barriers by virtue of his intelligence.

The married life though normal could be painful and disturbed. The native remains unsuccessful in his love affairs or he may not be blessed with a desired spouse. The native may also suffer deceit in secret affairs. The family life remains disturbed; peace and happiness remain absent.

The enemies of the native hatch conspiracies against him and try to cause harm but they are not much successful. The native may suffer from sexual disorders. The financial position remains little fragile.

The native normally does not get benefit of his ancestral property. Either he gives it away in charity or it gets destroyed. The money lent to others may not come back. The worries and mental unrest do not leave the native due to one reason or other.

The happiness from children may be less. You should try to maintain good rapport with your spouse with a spirit of compromise; only then family life may be successful.

Generally Sade-Sati comes thrice in a horoscope in the life time - first in childhood, second in youth & third in old-age. First Sade-Sati has effect on education & parents. report.report:
In your horoscope the Sheshnag Kaal Sarp Yog is present. This yog is more influential as Rahu/Ketu are situated with Sun/Moon. Due to this reason the native generally lives away from his native place. The enemies of the native hatch conspiracies against him and try to cause harm. The native faces many problems in arguments, legal cases and conflicts; defeat is not ruled out. THe may be imprisoned.

Due to Kaal Sarp Yog the native suffers from diseases many times that cause loss of money. The worries and mental unrest do not leave the native due to one reason or other. The native's way of working is peculiar. There are hurdles in life and native has to struggle for moving ahead. The financial position remains little fragile. Due to Kaal Sarp Yog the native remains disheartened and depressed. The desired work does not get completed. If at all it reaches completion it is very late. There may be debts. The life may be mysterious.

On many occasions there is fall of prestige or there is lack of esteem. However the native also gets a miraculous time in life. The native gets renown at the fag end of his life or after his death.
